sourcePurpose: Verified company-related events with reliable publishedAt timestamps, enabling PIT-safe event context in prediction snapshots. Priority: official TWSE/MOPS announcements with authoritative timestamps.

possibleSourceTypes.description: 公開資訊觀測站 (MOPS) official company announcements — 重大訊息
possibleSourceTypes.publishedAtField: announcementDate (公告日期時間) — highly reliable, system-timestamped by MOPS
possibleSourceTypes.reliability: HIGH — official TWSE/MOPS timestamp, not broker or media lag
possibleSourceTypes.notes: Best PIT-safe source. Announcement time is recorded to-the-minute by MOPS. Covers: earnings, dividends, capital changes, material events.
Market-wide announcements, trading halts, exchange-level events

possibleSourceTypes.description: Operator manually constructs verified event CSV from MOPS announcements
possibleSourceTypes.publishedAtField: publishedAt — must be captured from original MOPS announcement, NOT from media re-publication time
possibleSourceTypes.reliability: HIGH if sourced from MOPS with verified timestamp
possibleSourceTypes.notes: Preferred for initial phase; operator records MOPS announcement date/time per event

possibleSourceTypes.description: Existing RSS/Cnyes news events in current DB
possibleSourceTypes.publishedAtField: publishedAt — UNRELIABLE for some sources; may default to ingest time
possibleSourceTypes.reliability: LOW-MEDIUM — publishedAt reliability not audited; mock events mixed in
possibleSourceTypes.notes: Not recommended for PIT-safe corpus until publishedAt audit passes. Can be used as supplementary after audit.

mandatory.description: Taiwan stock symbol; empty string for market-wide events
THE PIT gate field. Must be MOPS announcement datetime, NOT media re-publication time.
Official announcement title or event headline
URL to original MOPS announcement or official source
Whether publishedAt is from an authoritative official source

optional.description: Brief description of the event content
MOPS 公告編號 for deduplication
Additional symbols affected by the event

forbidden.reason: Post-hoc outcome that embeds future price movement
Post-hoc data often published days after announcement
NOT a PIT gate; reflects system ingestion time, not event time

eventTaxonomy.notes: Taxonomy is additive. Future phases may add sub-types. No sentiment labels (bullish/bearish) in taxonomy — sentiment must not be baked into event records.

pitSafeRule.rule: A NewsEvent row is PIT-available at asOfDate iff publishedAt <= asOfDate (Asia/Taipei end-of-day UTC+8) ingestedAt is NEVER a valid PIT gate.
pitSafeRule.timezone: publishedAt is stored in UTC ISO-8601; compare with asOfDate end-of-day = 23:59:59.999 Asia/Taipei = next day 15:59:59.999 UTC
pitSafeRule.mockEventRule: Mock events (sourceType='mock', verificationStatus!='VERIFIED_OFFICIAL') must be excluded from PIT-safe corpus queries

queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NewsEvent WHERE ABS(JULIANDAY(publishedAt) - JULIANDAY(ingestedAt)) < 0.001 -- same-second = ingest default
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NewsEvent WHERE source LIKE '%mock%' OR source LIKE '%Mock%'
SELECT source, COUNT(*) FROM NewsEvent GROUP BY source ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC -- source distribution
existingDBAuditRequired.expectedFindings: Some fraction of rows likely have publishedAt ≈ ingestedAt (unreliable). These rows must be excluded from PIT-safe queries until re-audited.
existingDBAuditRequired.auditOutcome: Only rows with VERIFIED_OFFICIAL verificationStatus or publishedAt significantly before ingestedAt (>60s gap) should be used

validatorGates: publishedAt field is valid ISO-8601 datetime
publishedAt is not in the future relative to preparedAt
eventType is a valid enum value from taxonomy
verificationStatus is VERIFIED_OFFICIAL or UNVERIFIED (no other values)
sourceUrl field non-empty for VERIFIED_OFFICIAL rows
no ingestedAt field present (not a PIT gate and must not be imported as such)
no sentiment labels (BULLISH_EVENT, BEARISH_EVENT, BUY_SIGNAL, SELL_SIGNAL)

conditions: source CSV files present in drop-zone
verificationStatus field present on all rows
publishedAt != ingestedAt for >95% of VERIFIED_OFFICIAL rows
Historical replay shows no leakage in replay corpus

forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT enter alphaScore until sourceStatus = AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE
Must NOT use ingestedAt as PIT gate under any circumstances
Must NOT include mock events in PIT-safe source files
Must NOT include sentiment labels derived from market reaction
Must NOT import without explicit approval token
Must NOT use RSS/media re-publication time as publishedAt proxy
Must NOT include outcomePrice, returnPct, or realizedReturnClass fields in any source CSV
disclaimer: Paper design only. Not for investment use. No performance claims.
